settings.text: A dark luxury streetwear label made in numbered runs. Forged for the hours after midnight.

settings.heading: After Midnight
settings.body: E4N began in the hours when the city empties and the only honest version of you is left. Placeholder copy — replace with the founding story.

settings.heading: Made in Numbers
settings.body: Every release is finite. Numbered, logged, and never restocked. Ownership is proof you were there.

settings.text: Forged for the hours after midnight.
